title: Laughter Ephraim
summary: A creative portfolio showcasing visual storytelling, multimedia work, and artistic projects.
shortDescription: A creative portfolio focused on storytelling through visual and multimedia experiences.

overview: Laughter Ephraim is a creative portfolio showcasing visual storytelling, multimedia work, and artistic projects.
The project focused on presenting creative work through a digital experience that could support visual and multimedia content.
challenges: The experience needed to support creative work, multimedia, and visual storytelling.
The layout needed to keep the work expressive without overwhelming the content.
approach: Designed the presentation around visual storytelling.
Built responsive content sections for creative and multimedia work.
Kept the interface focused on the work being presented.
outcome: The result is a creative portfolio focused on storytelling through visual and multimedia experiences.
caseStudy.pullQuote: The interface needed to create room for the creative work to lead.

interactionPreview.label: Interaction preview
interactionPreview.caption: A short preview of the Laughter Ephraim creative portfolio experience.
